post_edit.description: Run relevant tests after file edits

user_prompt_submit.command: echo '🤔 CRITICAL THINKING: Investigate first to answer questions yourself. BUT push back if: 1) something feels wrong/missing critical info, 2) conflicts with your understanding, OR 3) you see a better way to accomplish the goal!'
user_prompt_submit.description: Remind Claude to investigate first, but suggest better approaches when appropriate
